title: Rich Buttery Korean Noodles
description: A hearty and comforting Korean-inspired dish featuring vermicelli rice noodles and ferment-kimchi, perfect for a hangover cure or a satisfying meal, and is dairy-free-friendly.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the vermicelli rice noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the sesame oil over medium heat and add the minced garlic and grated ginger.
Cook the garlic and ginger for 1 minute, until fragrant, then add the vegan butter and stir until melted.
Add the ferment-kimchi to the skillet and stir to combine with the garlic and ginger mixture.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the kimchi mixture.
Season with soy sauce and stir to combine.
Transfer the noodles to a serving dish and sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds and chopped scallions.
